pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missed optimizations, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 17; keeping java.version at 11 would result in incorrect compiler flags and potential runtime incompatibilities with libraries requiring Java 17 features.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet import with jakarta.servlet to align with Spring Boot 3's Jakarta EE 9+ namespace.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet does not exist in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not available in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing a compile error.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Migrate WebSocket imports from javax.websocket to jakarta.websocket to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: javax.websocket package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.websocket does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Migrate WebSocket imports from javax.websocket to jakarta.websocket to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: Compilation failure: package javax.websocket does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ dependencies.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Nonnull with jakarta.annotation.Nonnull to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed from the JDK and not available by default in Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE environments, causing a compile error for missing class.

src/test/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 import with JUnit 5 import to align with Spring Boot 3's default testing framework.
src/test/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test) are not available or compatible with the JUnit 5 platform used by Spring Boot 3, causing compilation errors or test execution failures.
